emails.subject: EOL Physical Transaction Capability
emails.body: EOL Physical Transaction Capability Stephanie, Can you please authorize my EOL account (ADM59501) so that I can transact internally with the following Tennessee Z-0 physical products: 1) Next day gas 2) Next day plus 1 3) Balance of month physical All transactions should go to my physical book, ENA-IM-Katy. Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks, Charlie Weldon Texas Gas Trading
